title: Helping the New Neighbor
synopsis: A child offers help to a new neighbor and discovers how small kindness can build trust quickly.
sentences: A moving van stopped outside Nia's house on Monday afternoon.
Boxes were carried in and out while a woman gave directions from the front door.
Nia watched from the window until her mother suggested they go and say hello.
They took over a small plate of biscuits as a welcome gift.
The new neighbor looked tired but pleased to meet them.
When one of the boxes broke, books slid across the path.
Nia knelt down at once and helped gather them up.
The neighbor thanked her and smiled for the first time.
Soon Nia was carrying lighter boxes into the hall with careful steps.
By the end of the afternoon, the front room looked much less crowded.
The neighbor promised to invite them for tea when everything was in place.
Nia went home feeling proud that she had helped someone feel welcome.
